prerequisites: A GIPHY developer account, created free at the GIPHY Developers portal (https://developers.giphy.com/).
A GIPHY app created on the Developer Dashboard, which produces the API key used for authentication.
Search terms to provide for the query, query_for_clips, query_for_gif, and query_for_stickers config fields, plus a start_date for incremental syncing.
Awareness that new keys are beta keys rate limited to 100 API calls per hour; higher volume requires upgrading the key to production status from the dashboard.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single GIPHY api_key, which the GIPHY API requires on every request as the api_key query parameter. Generate the key by creating an app on the GIPHY Developer Dashboard, then enter it into the connector's api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Create a GIPHY developer account
setupSteps.body: Sign in or register at the GIPHY Developers portal (https://developers.giphy.com/). A free account is sufficient to obtain an API key.

setupSteps.title: Create an app to generate an API key
setupSteps.body: Open the Developer Dashboard (https://developers.giphy.com/dashboard/) and click 'Create an App'. Enter a name and description, then create the app. GIPHY issues a beta API key, which is shown on the dashboard for the app.

setupSteps.title: Optionally upgrade to a production key
setupSteps.body: Beta keys are rate limited to 100 searches/API calls per hour. If you need higher throughput, submit an application from your dashboard to upgrade the key to production status; GIPHY reviews the request and follows up by email.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the GIPHY API key into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it as the api_key parameter on each GIPHY API request.

setupSteps.title: Configure the query and sync settings
setupSteps.body: Set the required search terms in query, query_for_clips, query_for_gif, and query_for_stickers, and set start_date to control the point from which data is synced.
